news.paragraph: Equity futures and exchange-traded funds are trending lower ahead of the release of a consumer inflation report. This upcoming inflation data serves as a key catalyst that could drive volatility for the SPY.
headlines: Exchange-Traded Funds, Equity Futures Fall Pre-Bell Tuesday Amid Consumer Inflation Report Release
